description: Exactly two entries, otherwise shaped like entries-consistent.json (same section order, ISO dates) — exercises reading fewer than n entries.

entries.content:
# 2026-07-19 — checkout: brief latency spike

## What happened
Checkout latency spiked briefly during a scheduled maintenance window.

## Timeline
At 13:00 maintenance began. 13:04 latency alert fired. 13:08 maintenance completed and latency recovered.

## Resolution
No action was needed; latency recovered once the maintenance window ended.

## Follow-ups
Move the maintenance window to a lower-traffic hour.

# 2026-07-10 — payments-api: delayed retries

## What happened
payments-api's retry queue briefly grew during a downstream slowdown.

## Timeline
At 08:20 the queue growth was noticed. 08:25 triage began. 08:36 the downstream service recovered and the queue drained.

## Resolution
No action was needed; the queue drained once the downstream service recovered.

## Follow-ups
Add a queue-depth alert so growth is caught earlier next time.
